zh.Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aufrica Of Galloway於大約1119年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，她的父親Fergus of Galloway40歲，母親Elizabeth FitzRoy25歲。她於1135年之前與King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red在曼島結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1166年在曼島享年48歲，埋葬在曼島。

zh-hans.Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aufrica Of Galloway于大约1119年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，她的父亲Fergus of Galloway40岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzRoy25岁。她于1135年之前与King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red在曼岛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1166年在曼岛享年48岁，埋葬在曼岛。

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Galloway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Galloway in southwest Scotland, named as ‘place of the foreign Gaels’, from Gaelic gall ‘foreigner’ + Gaidheal ‘Gael’. From the 8th century or before it was a province of Anglian Northumbria. In the 9th century it was settled by mixed Gaelic-Norse inhabitants from the Hebrides and Isle of Man.

variants.name: Gallaway
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Galloway  .

variants.name: Galway
meanings: Irish and Scottish: in most cases, probably a variant of Scottish   Galloway  , rather than from the city or county in Connacht (habitational names are rare in Ireland). During the Middle Ages Galways were wealthy merchants on the south coast of Ireland, but now the name there is largely confined to Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Aufrica
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name recorded in the U.S. since the 18th century and now favoured by African Americans conscious of their ancestral heritage.

en.lifeSummary: When Aufrica Of Galloway was born about 1119, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Fergus of Galloway, was 40 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzRoy, was 25. She married King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red before 1135, in Isle of Man. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1166, in Isle of Man, at the age of 48, and was buried in Isle of Man.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aufrica Of Galloway est née environ 1119, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Fergus of Galloway, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzRoy, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red avant 1135, à Île de Man. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1166, à Île de Man, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Île de Man.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aufrica Of Galloway um 1119 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fergus of Galloway 40 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth FitzRoy 25. Sie hat vor 1135 in Isle of Man King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1166 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Isle of Man und wurde in Isle of Man begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aufrica Of Galloway è nata il circa 1119 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Fergus of Galloway, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth FitzRoy, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red prima del 1135, nel Isola di Man. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1166, nel Isola di Man, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Isola di Man.

ja.Ramsey, Isle of Man, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイル
ja.Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリック
ja.Holyrood Abbey, Edinburgh, Edinburghshir: イギリススコットランドエディンブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Aufrica Of Gallowayが約1119年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Fergus of Gallowayは40歳，母Elizabeth FitzRoyは25歳であった。1135年以前にマン島でKing Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Redと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1166年にマン島で48歳で死去し，マン島にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aufrica Of Galloway(이)가 대략 1119년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fergus of Galloway(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzRoy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1135년 이전 맨섬에서 King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1166년 맨섬에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 맨섬에 묻혔다.

mn.Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland: Carrick, Air, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Holyrood Abbey, Edinburgh, Edinburghshir: Dùn Èideann, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aufrica Of Galloway nasceu aproximadamente 1119, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Fergus of Galloway, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzRoy, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red antes 1135, em Ilha de Man. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1166, em Ilha de Man, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Ilha de Man.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aufrica Of Galloway родилась около 1119 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Fergus of Galloway было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzRoy, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red перед 1135 г. в местности Остров Мэн. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1166 г. в местности Остров Мэн в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Остров Мэн.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aufrica Of Galloway nació aproximadamente 1119, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Fergus of Galloway, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzRoy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red antes de 1135, en Isla de Man. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1166, en Isla de Man, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Isla de Man.
